---
description: "Read **docs/constitutions/design.yaml** first and hold it as the authority for the rest of this session."
---

Follow the workflow defined in `.claude/commands/align-specs.md` in this
repository. Read that file and execute its steps exactly — it is the
canonical definition of the /align-specs command; this prompt is a thin adapter
so the command stays single-sourced. Treat any text after the prompt
invocation as the command's arguments ($ARGUMENTS).
